main_article.title: A comprehensive analysis of humanized mouse models for the study of cancer immunotherapies

slides.title: 突破性发现：人源化小鼠免疫评估新范式
slides.subtitle: Front Immunol 2026 · Hu-CD34+ vs Hu-PBMC
key_points: 系统比较两大HIS模型重建动力学与毒性
为临床前联合用药策略提供依据
slides.visual_description: White humanized lab mouse with immune cell network, PD-1 antibody and tumor cell metaphors, hand-drawn technical explainer style
slides.narration: 本周聚焦Front Immunol 2026系统综述：Hu-CD34+与Hu-PBMC两大人源化模型，如何影响肿瘤免疫药物临床前评估。

slides.title: 免疫重建动力学：慢热 vs 速攻
slides.subtitle: Hu-CD34+ 12–16周 vs Hu-PBMC 1–2周
slides.visual_description: Dual curve chart comparing CD34+ slow S-curve vs PBMC rapid T-cell engraftment over weeks

curves: Hu-CD34+ blue S-curve peaking 50-70% at weeks 12-16
Hu-PBMC orange rapid curve peaking 90%+ T cells by week 1-2

slides.narration: Hu-CD34+模型需要12到16周完成多谱系重建，而Hu-PBMC模型在一到两周内即可实现高效T细胞植入。

slides.title: SGM3加速重建的代价：39%致死率
slides.subtitle: Weeks 10–17 髓系过度激活窗口
key_points: 选型需平衡速度与实验窗口
slides.visual_description: Survival or toxicity timeline showing mortality spike weeks 10-17 in NSG-SGM3 humanized mice

curves: Survival drops from 100% to 61% by week 20
Major drop zone weeks 10-17 due to myeloid hyperactivation

slides.narration: 在NSG-SGM3背景中，虽然免疫重建加速，但第10到17周出现高达39%的致死风险，实验窗口必须精打细算。

slides.title: 免疫疗法疗效：模型决定结论
slides.subtitle: PD-1温和 · EpCAM-CD3 TCE 3/9 CR
key_points: PD-1在Hu-CD34+中响应异质、整体温和
slides.visual_description: Bar or comparison panel: anti-PD1 modest response, EpCAM-CD3 bispecific 3/9 complete response, IL-2 complex strong but GvHD warning
slides.narration: PD-1单抗在Hu-CD34+模型中效果受限，而EpCAM-CD3 T细胞衔接器在Hu-PBMC模型中实现了3只小鼠的完全肿瘤消退。

slides.title: 研发启示：选对模型与联合策略
slides.subtitle: TCE/IL-2Cx vs PD-1需不同评估路径
key_points: TCE与IL-2Cx适合现有HIS平台快速验证
PD-1单药可能低估潜力，需APC增强联用
slides.visual_description: Decision flowchart for choosing Hu-CD34+ vs Hu-PBMC and combo strategies with Flt3L or CD40 agonist for PD-1
slides.narration: 对于T细胞衔接器和IL-2Cx，现有HIS模型是可靠平台；PD-1则需要联合增强APC功能的策略才能更贴近临床。

slides.title: 参考文献
slides.subtitle: 主线 + 关联阅读
key_points: ① 主线 Front Immunol 2026 PMID 42023233 DOI 10.3389/fimmu.2026.1730378
② EpCAM-CD3 TCE疗效（Hu-PBMC 3/9 CR）同上
③ MHC-KO低GvHD模型 Yaguchi 2018 PMID 29151581 DOI 10.1038/cmi.2017.106
slides.visual_description: Clean reference list slide, hand-drawn style, three verified citations with PMID and DOI
slides.narration: 参考文献已列出，主线文献与关联模型论文均可通过PMID和DOI反向检索。
